TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qbuciy, title = qbuciy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qbuciy} }

S.FORM: qbuciy qbuciy hya ga inkyasan na squliq, aring squ tunux, qolu, qba, skutaw, ktu, muzi ru tehuk sa kakay ta.
qbuciy qbuciy hya ga inkyasan na squliq, aring squ tunux, qolu, qba, skutaw, ktu, muzi ru tehuk sa kakay ta.
S.PHON: qβuʦ~ʨij qβuʦ~ʨij ħja ɣa inkjas~ɕan na s~ɕquliq, ariŋ s~ɕqu tunux, qolu, qβa, s~ɕkutaw, ktu, muzi ru teħuk s~ɕa kakaj ta.
